name: BB:BehaviourDefinition: Unauthorized User Creating Namespaces
notes: This Building Block identifies unauthorized users creating namespaces.
bb_references: BB:BehaviourDefinition: Unauthorized User Creating Namespaces on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event QID is one of the following (113500612) Create a Namespace
when the event matches Username is not any of authorized_users, Username is not any of kubernetes-admin
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviourDefinition: Unauthorized User Creating Namespaces on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event QID is one of the following (113500612) Create a Namespace
AND when the event matches Username is not any of authorized_users, Username is not any of kubernetes-admin
